---
name: Content fix
about: A typo, outdated fact, or broken link in the site's copy
title: "docs: "
labels: content
assignees: Samukelo-Mkhonza
---

**Where**
File in [`src/content/`](../../src/content/) or the page/section on the live
site (see [CONTENT.md](../../CONTENT.md) for where content lives).

**What's wrong**
Current text vs. what it should say.

**Additional context**
Anything else worth knowing.
